description: Adds a small, explicitly-approved set of write actions for a documented revenue campaign. It does NOT disable the global read-only policy: all research still runs read-only. Each write action must live inside an approved RUN with an exact URL and, where text applies, exact final text, and executes exactly once.
action_requirements: has exact final text where text applies (comment, post)
connection requests use a short, natural reason without links or pitch
messages and replies triggered by a new interaction require a fresh, specific approval at send time
approved (RUN approved:true, and for profile: changeset approved)
executed exactly once (idempotent — check not-already-done first)
stops on any warning, CAPTCHA, checkpoint, throttling, login or ambiguous selector

approval_contract.command_template: EJECUTA RUN-XX COMPLETO SIN CAMBIAR OBJETIVOS, URLs NI TEXTOS.
approval_contract.authorizes: only actions inside that one RUN that have visible final text, an exact URL, approved:true, and are not yet executed
does_not_authorize: changing profile parts outside the approved changeset
messages or replies that depend on a later interaction without a fresh, specific approval
approval_contract.after_approval: Do not change any text or destination. If an action needs a new decision, skip it and report.

initial_follow_exception.reason: one-time campaign setup block explicitly fixed by the campaign owner
